items.title: The best way to catch bugs is to use the product and see if you can break it.
items.title_zh: 捕获错误的最好方法是使用该产品，看看是否可以破坏它。
items.description: The best way to catch bugs is to use the product and see if you can break it. You’re not going to find most bugs by dead reckoning the code. You’re reviewing the code itself for architecture and API design… to control the increase in techn…
items.description_zh: 捕获错误的最好方法是使用该产品，看看是否可以破坏它。通过航位推算代码你不会发现大多数错误。您正在审查代码本身的架构和 API 设计……以控制技术的增长……

items.title: One of the things I love about Claude Fable 5 is that it knew to use propensity score mat…
items.title_zh: 我喜欢《克劳德寓言 5》的原因之一是它知道如何使用倾向评分表……
items.description: One of the things I love about Claude Fable 5 is that it knew to use propensity score matching (matching users on activity so you compare like with like) in my retention analysis without me asking. It’s exciting to see Fable 5’s improved j…
items.description_zh: 我喜欢 Claude Fable 5 的原因之一是，它知道在我的保留分析中使用倾向得分匹配（根据活动匹配用户，以便您进行同类比较），而无需我询问。看到《神鬼寓言 5》的改进真是令人兴奋……

items.title: 🏁 I animated the token 💰 spend race, from ~lifetime Vercel AI Gateway usage, which aggr…
items.title_zh: 🏁 我对代币 💰 花费竞赛进行了动画处理，来自 Vercel AI Gateway 的终生使用，这聚合了……
items.description: 🏁 I animated the token 💰 spend race, from ~lifetime Vercel AI Gateway usage, which aggregates trillions of tokens from millions of developers a month. Fascinating to see the fluctuations among the labs, Anthropic's dominance, and the ris…
items.description_zh: 🏁 我动画化了代币💰 支出竞赛，来自 Vercel AI Gateway 的终生使用，该网关每月聚合来自数百万开发者的数万亿代币。令人着迷的是看到实验室之间的波动、人类的主导地位以及危机……
